meta.title: Alex Rivera — Full-Stack Engineer
meta.description: Full-stack engineer building reliable products from UI to infrastructure.

person.name: Alex Rivera
person.title: Full-Stack Engineer
person.bio: I design and ship end-to-end web products—clean interfaces, solid APIs, and pragmatic cloud setups. Open to interesting problems and thoughtful collaboration.

greeting.headline: Hi, I'm Alex — I build full-stack products people enjoy using.
greeting.subheadline: TypeScript across the stack, with a bias for clarity, performance, and maintainable systems.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Tools I reach for most often

experience.description: Lead delivery of customer-facing dashboards and internal APIs for a B2B analytics product.
highlights: Cut p95 API latency 40% with query tuning and caching
Introduced design tokens and a shared UI kit used by 3 squads
Owned on-call rotation for core billing services

experience.description: Built multi-tenant SaaS features across web client and NestJS services.
highlights: Shipped SSO and role-based access for enterprise customers
Migrated legacy REST surface to versioned APIs with OpenAPI docs

education.description: Focus on distributed systems and HCI electives.

projects.title: Pulseboard
projects.description: Real-time ops dashboard with role-aware widgets and exportable reports. Built as a reference multi-tenant Next app.

projects.title: SchemaForge CLI
projects.description: Developer tool that generates typed API clients from OpenAPI with CI drift checks.

projects.title: TinyTrace
projects.description: Lightweight OpenTelemetry sampler and flamegraph viewer for local debugging.

achievements.title: Speaker — Local JS Meetup
achievements.description: Talk on progressive migration strategies for monolith frontends.

achievements.title: Open Source Maintainer
achievements.description: Maintain a small React form utility with 1k+ weekly downloads.

posts.summary: Practical conventions for errors, pagination, and evolution.

posts.title: When to reach for edge vs origin
